description_long: This is a modern, three-seat sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a clean and boxy silhouette. The sofa has three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and plush for comfort. Two additional throw pillows are placed at each end, adding a touch of coziness and visual interest. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, aligning with the backrest height for a cohesive look. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, with small, recessed legs barely visible, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte, soft texture, and the overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern, light beige three-seat sofa with plush, loose cushions and wide, padded armrests. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring a solid matte fabric and subtle throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, two throw pillows, and wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniformity of the sofa's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest profile and the alignment of seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, with two additional throw pillows at the ends; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a boxy, minimalist profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Small, recessed block legs, likely made of wood or metal, minimally visible and positioned at the corners and possibly along the base for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions; medium height and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
